# Node.js Playwright + Cucumber Test Automation Project

This project uses Playwright for browser automation and Cucumber for BDD testing.

## Project Structure
- `features/` - Cucumber feature files (BDD scenarios)
- `step-definitions/` - JavaScript step definitions
- `pages/` - Page Object Model classes
- `utils/` - Test utilities and helpers
- `reports/` - Test execution reports

## Key Dependencies
- @playwright/test - Playwright testing framework
- @cucumber/cucumber - Cucumber BDD framework
- cucumber-playwright - Integration between Cucumber and Playwright

## Running Tests
- `npm test` - Run all tests
- `npm run test:headed` - Run tests in headed mode
- `npm run test:debug` - Run tests in debug mode
